title: plantago coronopus var. laciniata
intro: Plantago coronopus var. laciniata, also known as buck's horn or cut leaf plantain, is a variety of the plantain plant (Plantago coronopus) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Plantago coronopus var. laciniata include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing digestive problems and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally to treat wounds and skin conditions, or internally to support overall health and well-being.
